meaning: n.[鍖籡榧荤値,榧荤矘鑶滅値
examples: Being somewhat skeptical in nature, he decided to stop using the mangosteen juice as a treatment for his allergic rhinitis for one day.
Mangosteen could be one of the possible remedies for allergic rhinitis because it blocks histamine production, but what about inflammation?
They may relieve some of the symptoms of allergic rhinitis temporarily.
In March 1999, Mrs Ward was diagnosed with allergic rhinitis and in April she was given a Beconase nasal spray.
And with GlaxoSmithKline, Sirna inked a deal to develop drugs for the treatment of respiratory diseases such as asthma and allergic rhinitis.
